series_metadata.series_title: DODD Level One Wavier Review and Monitoring
series_metadata.series_description: Documentation to include documentation on approval, denials, termination, quality assurance reviews, compliance review reports, physical inspection reports, interview documentation (provider, enrollees, administrators).

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: in office, 4 years in records center ; Electronic: in office receipt of final payment or any audit findings or lawsuits have been resolved
